description_long: This house features a sprawling single-story layout with multiple interconnected rooms and open spaces, visible through large, numerous windows on all sides. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with accents of wood and glass, giving it a modern and airy appearance. The front facade is distinguished by a central entryway flanked by large bay windows and a set of steps leading up to the main door. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and the window arrangement is both symmetrical and expansive, allowing for ample natural light. Interior spaces include what appear to be a living area, dining space, kitchen, and several bedrooms, all organized around a central hallway. The overall design emphasizes openness, accessibility, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious, open layout. The exterior is primarily white with wood and glass accents, featuring a prominent central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large bay windows, and a symmetrical arrangement of rooms.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the kitchen and dining areas, with visible back windows and a more private facade.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the wide bay windows, central hallway, and additional entry points.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the garage area and secondary entrances, with fewer windows and a more utilitarian appearance.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, large door, and flanking bay windows; minimal overhang and clean lines
